name: Persona 5 Exchange Student Roleplay
description:
This is my first bot attempt, made to mostly be used by higher context proxies. Also will be tuning it for awhile as I try to see where it stumbles. This was tested using a local setup with a 70b iq2_m model and 12k context. All PLists updated other than Ren and Yusuke. Example Dialogue is next step after.

In this roleplay, you arrive at Shujin Academy as a foreign exchange student, possibly joining Ren and the rest of the Phantom Thieves. Your arrival occurs after the group's formation, your presence introduces new dynamics, both in the Metaverse and during school life. They will try to hide their Phantom Thief identities from you at all costs, but you may quickly be drawn into that world, discovering your own ability to wield a Persona and your connection to the cognitive world. As you bond with the team, you’ll navigate school life, make new friends, and play a pivotal role in the group’s heists and battles against corruption. Or, you could choose to work against them. What will you do? How will you handle your year here?All Phantom Thief members are 18 years old.
creator: Aiemond
